summary: Completed testing of User Regime feature. All features working correctly: regime field in Edit/Create dialogs, different cell types in Planning (Journée=square, 2×8=split horizontal, 3×8=circular with 3 sectors), cell click functionality, and regime badges. Fixed bug in CreateMemberRequest model missing regime field.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CreateMemberRequest model was missing 'regime' field - added it with default value 'Journée'
Fixed: create_member endpoint in server.py was not including regime field when creating user
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added regime field to user_dict in create_member endpoint
/app/tests/test_regime_feature.py - Created comprehensive test suite for regime feature
seed_data_creation: Created test users with different regimes during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Regime feature fully tested. Features verified: 1) Regime field visible in Edit User dialog with 3 options (Journée, 2×8, 3×8), 2) Regime field visible in Create Member dialog, 3) Planning page shows different cell types based on regime: Journée=full square, 2×8=horizontally split, 3×8=circular with 3 sectors, 4) Cell click toggles availability correctly for all regimes, 5) Regime badges (2×8, 3×8) displayed next to user names in Planning, 6) Backend API supports regime field in user CRUD operations and availability fields (disponible, disponible_matin, disponible_aprem, disponible_nuit).

regime_field_in_edit_dialog.details: Regime select field found with 3 options: Journée, 2×8 (Matin/Après-midi), 3×8 (Matin/Après-midi/Nuit)

regime_field_in_create_dialog.details: Regime select field found in Create Member dialog with same 3 options

journee_cells_in_planning.details: Users with Journée regime have full square cells

2x8_cells_in_planning.details: Users with 2×8 regime have horizontally split cells (matin/aprem)

3x8_cells_in_planning.details: Users with 3×8 regime have circular cells with 3 sectors (SVG)

2x8_cell_click.details: Clicking on matin/aprem parts changes only that part

3x8_cell_click.details: Clicking on sectors changes only that sector

regime_badges.details: 2×8 and 3×8 badges displayed next to user names in Planning

backend_regime_api.details: All 13 backend tests passed - regime field in login, users list, user update, create member

availability_fields.details: Availability API supports disponible, disponible_matin, disponible_aprem, disponible_nuit fields

bugs_fixed.issue: create_member endpoint not including regime in user_dict
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'regime': request.regime if request.regime else 'Journée' to user_dict
